display.purpose: Hero headlines (H1). The primary emotional statement. One per page.

headline.purpose: Section headings (H2). Page titles, major content dividers.

title.purpose: Card headings, process step names (H3). Third hierarchy tier.

script.purpose: Pre-heading eyebrows only. Always paired immediately above a Cinzel heading. Never standalone.

body.purpose: All prose, descriptions, FAQ answers. Max 65-75ch line length.

label.purpose: Process numbers, badge text, pricing labels, Coming Soon caption.

shadows.name: header-blur
shadows.purpose: Sticky header only. Structural legibility on scroll. Not decorative.

shadows.name: btn-hover
shadows.purpose: All button hover states. The only permitted hover motion in the system.

shadows.name: tab-active
shadows.purpose: Active tab/chip only. Signals selected filter state.

motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (nav logo, button hover).

motion.name: faq-open
motion.purpose: Accordion panels opening. Slightly springier for organic feel.

motion.name: draw-stroke
motion.purpose: Showreel F animation. Stroke-dashoffset keyframe animation.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Single breakpoint. Below: stack grids, show mobile nav, hide desktop logo.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Gold fill, pill shape. Primary conversion action. Footer CTA and hero only.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(215,173,99,0.95); background: rgba(215,173,99,0.95); color: #0b0d12; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; padding: 0.55rem 1.1rem; transition: transform 0.2s ease; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(215,173,99,0.55); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.65; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent with amber border. Secondary action alongside a primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(215,173,99,0.98); background: rgba(215,173,99,0.07); color: #f5f7fa; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; padding: 0.55rem 1.1rem; transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; text-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.75); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(11,13,18,0.65); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(215,173,99,0.55); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Dark gradient card. Used for process steps, service descriptions, feature content.
components.html:
Kennenlerngespräch

Wir sprechen über euren Tag, eure Wünsche und den gewünschten Look.
components.css: .ds-card { border: 1px solid #252c3a; background: linear-gradient(155deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.04), rgba(255,255,255,0.02)); border-radius: 16px; padding: 1.1rem; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Cinzel', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.05rem; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #f5f7fa; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card-body { color: #a7b0c0; line-height: 1.65; margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; }

components.name: Testimonial Card
components.description: Quote card for couple testimonials. Script opening quote mark, author attribution below.
components.html:
Joel hat unseren Hochzeitstag so wunderschön festgehalten. Der Film hat uns beide zu Tränen gerührt.

Anna & Markus

Hochzeit 2024
components.css: .ds-testimonial { border: 1px solid #252c3a; border-radius: 16px; padding: 1.5rem; background: linear-gradient(155deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.03), rgba(255,255,255,0.01)); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; } .ds-testimonial-quote { color: #a7b0c0; line-height: 1.72; flex: 1; font-style: italic; margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; } .ds-testimonial-quote::before { content: '\201C'; font-family: 'Great Vibes', cursive; color: #d7ad63; font-size: 3rem; line-height: 0; vertical-align: -0.7rem; margin-right: 0.15rem; font-style: normal; } .ds-testimonial-author { font-weight: 700; color: #f5f7fa; font-size: 0.95rem; margin: 0; } .ds-testimonial-date { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #d7ad63; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0.2rem 0 0; }

components.name: FAQ Accordion Item
components.description: Expandable Q&A. Amber toggle icon, gradient tint when open. Used for FAQ and pricing.
components.html: Alles fängt mit eurer Buchungsanfrage an. Falls euer Tag noch frei ist, reserviere ich ihn für euch.
components.css: .ds-faq { border: 1px solid #252c3a; border-radius: 16px; background: linear-gradient(155deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.03), rgba(255,255,255,0.01)); overflow: hidden; transition: border-color 200ms ease; } .ds-faq[data-open='true'] { border-color: rgba(215,173,99,0.7); background: linear-gradient(155deg, rgba(215,173,99,0.09), #121722); } .ds-faq-summary { width: 100%; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; border: 0; padding: 1rem 2.6rem 1rem 1.1rem; font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.03rem; color: #f5f7fa; position: relative; line-height: 1.45; font-family: 'Cinzel', Georgia, serif; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-faq-summary::after { content: '+'; position: absolute; right: 1.05rem; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: #d7ad63; font-weight: 900; width: 1.4rem; height: 1.4rem; display: grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(215,173,99,0.45); background: rgba(215,173,99,0.08); } .ds-faq[data-open='true'] .ds-faq-summary::after { content: '-'; } .ds-faq-panel { padding: 0 1.1rem 1rem; overflow: hidden; transition: max-height 400ms cubic-bezier(0.07,0.82,0.16,1), opacity 220ms ease; } .ds-faq-panel p { color: #a7b0c0; line-height: 1.65; margin: 0; font-size: 0.97rem; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Centered-logo split nav. Two links left, logo center, two links right. Logo animates on scroll.
components.html:
Über michPreise
JE
FAQKontakt
components.css: .ds-header { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 120; border-bottom: 1px solid #252c3a; backdrop-filter: blur(14px); background: rgba(11,13,18,0.8); } .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 1.35rem; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 88px; } .ds-nav-link { color: #a7b0c0; font-size: 1.06rem; text-decoration: none; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #f5f7fa; } .ds-nav-link.active { color: #f5f7fa; } .ds-nav-logo { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0 0.25rem; } .ds-nav-logo-box { width: 60px; height: 60px; background: rgba(215,173,99,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(215,173,99,0.4); border-radius: 8px; display: grid; place-items: center; color: #d7ad63; font-family: 'Cinzel', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.1rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; }

components.name: Process Step Card
components.description: Numbered step in the workflow sequence. Amber step number badge, dark background.
components.html:
01

Kennenlerngespräch

Wir sprechen über euren Tag, eure Wünsche und den gewünschten Look.
components.css: .ds-step { border: 1px solid #2a3244; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(15,20,30,0.95), rgba(12,16,25,0.9)); border-radius: 16px; padding: 1.5rem 1.1rem 1.1rem; } .ds-step-num { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2rem; height: 2rem; border-radius: 999px; margin-bottom: 0.55rem; background: rgba(215,173,99,0.18); border: 1px solid rgba(215,173,99,0.55); color: #d7ad63; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.04em; font-family: 'Cinzel', Georgia, serif; } .ds-step-title { font-family: 'Cinzel', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.05rem; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #f5f7fa; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-step-body { color: #a7b0c0; line-height: 1.65; margin: 0; font-size: 0.97rem; }

narrative.overview:
The JE Media design system is the space before the film begins: dark, warm, expectant. Every surface is a screening room waiting for images that carry more weight than any interface element ever could. Amber Filament (#d7ad63) is not a brand accent in the conventional sense; it is atmospheric light, the glow of a projector aperture, the only warm source in a deliberately dark room.

Typography carries a deliberate tension. Cinzel's Roman-carved geometry anchors headings in something timeless, while Great Vibes script eyebrows breathe warmth and human presence into the hierarchy. The body type (Inter) stays completely out of the way.

The system rejects two failure modes: the generic videographer website (harsh black, high-voltage yellow, action-hero energy) and the corporate agency surface (cold grid, transactional tone, zero human presence). Couples arriving here should feel invited, not processed.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first: cinema darkness as focus, never as trend
Gold as warmth, not luxury signaling; rarity is the point
Three-voice typography: Roman gravitas + calligraphy warmth + humanist clarity
Generous whitespace; the eye rests, imagery breathes
Personal singular: no 'our team', no enterprise grid, no conversion-rate urgency

rules.name: The One Source Rule
rules.body: Amber Filament is the only chromatic color in the system. It earns its impact through rarity. If two things are gold on the same screen, one of them shouldn't be.

rules.name: The Warm Black Rule
rules.body: Never use #000 or pure #fff. Midnight Ink and Soft Projection are the absolute extremes.

rules.name: The Script-Is-A-Whisper Rule
rules.body: Great Vibes only appears as a pre-heading eyebrow, never as a standalone heading, never in navigation, never in body copy.

rules.name: The Scale Minimum Rule
rules.body: Never use fewer than three distinct weights in a section that has a heading + body structure.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Motion on hover signals interactivity; it does not elevate the surface visually. Do not add box-shadow to cards, FAQ items, or pricing panels.

dos: Do use Amber Filament on interactive states and essential UI affordances only. Its rarity is its power.
Do pair every Cinzel headline with a Great Vibes script eyebrow when there is a section title structure.
Do give imagery breathing room. When a photo or video is present, reduce surrounding UI to its minimum.
Do use transform: translateY(-1px) as the exclusive hover motion for buttons.
Do maintain the stepped dark surfaces: Midnight Ink for base, Screening Room for lifted cards, Deep Frame for navigation chips.
Do keep all body text at Silver Grain inside cards and Soft Projection on open dark surfaces.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient fill). Every heading is solid color.
Don't reproduce the generic videographer website: no high-contrast yellow-on-black, no action-hero energy.
Don't add agency-feeling UI: no multi-column feature grids with icon-heading-text cards, no enterprise pricing tables.
Don't use Great Vibes in navigation, buttons, body copy, or as a standalone heading. Eyebrow-only.
Don't add glassmorphism surfaces decoratively. The only permitted blur-glass is the sticky header.
Don't add box-shadow to cards, FAQ items, or pricing panels. They are flat.
